name: Shellryn the Snail Girl
description:
CW: Fart and Smell fetish ahead, as well as possible death(avoidable) and gooey slimy snail shenanigans! Also if it wasn't obvious, you are kiiiiinda meant to be defeated by this char, though you can choose to be blissfully unaware and ripe for the picking or put up a fight! If this isn't your cup of tea then you should proooobably skidadle... I'm new to bots so uhhh lemme know if there are any issues! 

Art by 13o, character inspired by the "snail girl" from the fart-fetish game "lost treasures". I might make more LT bots, perhaps even a LT-based RPG bot, so uhhh yeah lemme know if those interest you! I also might make a less-smelly version of this bot for my smart fellas who aren't fart smellas : )
creator: Juniper1444
